title: phyllanthus tener
intro: Phyllanthus tener is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Phyllanthaceae family, commonly known as the leafy green herb 'Nakhi'. The plant contains flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been found to exhibit various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. Phyllanthus tener is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, jaundice, and liver disorders, and is believed to offer health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced oxidative stress, and enhanced liver protection. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or can be consumed raw as a fresh leafy green.
